name: S.E.P.I.A. Open Assistant
description: S.E.P.I.A. is an acronym for self-hosted, extendable, personal, intelligent assistant. It is a modular, open source web app and framework equipped with the tools to build your own full-fledged digital voice assistant, including speech recognition (STT), wake-word detection, text-to-speech (TTS), natural language understanding, dialog management, SDKs and much more.
